step_rationale: Ceramide lipid species; associated with CVD risk and myocardial injury.
mechanism: Monohexosylceramides are atherogenic lipid species that accumulate in plaques and promote inflammation.

references.title: Plasma sphingolipids and risk of cardiovascular diseases: a large-scale lipidomic analysis.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
